title: Admin Panel — Moderate User-Submitted Content
description: ARCHETYPE: admin_tool. Shape: auth-gated admin app for reviewing + moderating user-submitted records. The CORE is that EVERY mutation endpoint has `requires role 'admin'` (not just `requires login`). An admin can list pending reviews, approve them, reject them. NOT a generic CRUD — the admin role gating is the differentiator. Include: POST /api/reviews (public — anyone can submit), GET /api/reviews/pending (admin-only, lists pending), PUT /api/reviews/:id/approve (admin-only), PUT /api/reviews/:id/reject (admin-only). Reviews have a status field (pending/approved/rejected). Admin endpoints return 403 to non-admin users.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

allow signup and login
owner is 'admin@example.com'

create a Reviews table:
  author_email, required
  content, required, min 1, max 500
  status, default 'pending'
  created_at_date, auto

# Your 4 endpoints here:
# 1. POST /api/reviews — public submit
# 2. GET /api/reviews/pending — requires role 'admin'
# 3. PUT /api/reviews/:id/approve — requires role 'admin'
# 4. PUT /api/reviews/:id/reject — requires role 'admin'

body.content: This is a test review submission.
